extra_model_fields.expected_outcome: Improved auditability and reproducibility, no change to numeric values; resolves metadata inconsistency for reviewers.
Improved auditability and reproducibility, no change to numeric values; resolves metadata inconsistency for reviewers.

planned_changes: Edit plc_safety_trace.md: add a 'README - formula mapping' section that lists each formula used and maps it to the exact CSV column name and the plain algebraic form (no spreadsheet cell refs).

Edit plc_safety_trace.md: add a short 'Numeric rules' subsection documenting rounding rules (none or specify), how negative priority values are handled, and explicit justification for using ABS(priority) when allocating budget.
Edit test_matrix.csv: add a plain-text column or comment row showing the algebraic formula equivalents for priority and sensitivity so the CSV is runnable as plain data without B2-style references.

Edit both artifacts: clarify label semantics (rename or annotate 'output_delay_rule'/'output_delay_breach') and add a one-line signed audit statement 'no external sources used' with author initials and ISO-8601 timestamp.

Update metadata/manifest: add a short note reconciling deterministic precheck behavior and model semantic scoring (which checks were deterministic, which were model-evaluated) to eliminate apparent inconsistency in review metadata.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Address minor clarity, reproducibility, and metadata-consistency issues called out by grader and verifier without changing validated numeric results.
